name: Plaid
api_notes: The API is a JSON-over-HTTP RESTful service. Access requires a client_id and secret. Detailed OpenAPI specifications are provided.
one_liner: Plaid provides a financial data network API that enables applications to securely connect with users' bank accounts and financial institutions.
auth_notes: Authentication is performed using a client_id and secret, which can be passed in the request body or via headers. OAuth tokens are used specifically for the Plaid MCP server access.
mcp_notes: Plaid offers an official MCP server to connect AI agents to Plaid's diagnostics and analytics tools.

evidence.claim: Plaid provides a comprehensive RESTful API for integrating financial data with a client_id and secret for authentication.
Developers can obtain free Sandbox and Development environment keys via the Plaid Dashboard without immediate payment or extensive approval, though Production access is gated.
Plaid provides an official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for connecting AI agents to its diagnostic and analytic tools.
Search citation: Plaid: Enabling all companies to build fintech solutions

access_notes: Developers can self-serve to get Sandbox and Development environment credentials for free. Production access requires a formal application process including company details and approval.
